method: Estimated drive time, not routed. minutes = haversine_km x windiness / speed_kmh x 60; windiness=1.3; speed 55 km/h if straight-line >20 km, 40 km/h if >8 km, else 28 km/h (urban). Origin = LSOA polygon centroid (mean of exterior-ring vertices; largest polygon for MultiPolygon). Candidate sites = sites of the system's trusts plus any site within 40 km of the system's LSOA bounding box (cross-border access), filtered to site_type containing 'Hospital' (all types if <3 remain). Each LSOA row stores its nearest 4 candidates as [siteIdx, minutes]; siteIdx indexes this file's sites array: [site_code, trust_code, name, lat, lng, site_type]. Replace with OSRM/ORS routed times for consultation-grade analysis.
